title: Need It
lyrics:
[LEX「Need It」歌詞]

[Intro]
She want to need it
目で分かる She wants to need it
俺らも I want to need it
She want to need it

[Chorus]
ほしがりちゃん
She want to need it
するdance for you 見て見ぬフリ
嫌いなの? let me love you
Let me love you

[Verse]
他には何もいらないbaby
I don't want nothing 君がいるよ
You need 僕のセラピー
僕の愛と僕のハグ
I need 君のセラピ
君のハグと君のlove
Too much too much your love
ダンスする彼女はlike Loco
旅立つたびに君可哀想
Shaaa you need it

[Chorus]
ほしがりちゃん
She want to need it
するdance for you 見て見ぬフリ
嫌いなの? let me love you
Let me love you
